title: Second-hand smoke exposure during pregnancy - Canada.ca
content:
## Second-hand smoke exposure during pregnancy
Know the risks of second-hand smoke for pregnant women.

## Services and information

### Smoking in pregnancy
Find out how smoking during your pregnancy and after childbirth can harm your baby.

### Reducing second-hand smoke exposure during pregnancy
Learn how to reduce the risk of second-hand smoke to yourself and your unborn baby.

### Laws and regulations
- Non-Smokers Health Act
- Tobacco Reporting Regulations
- Tobacco Products Labelling Regulations
- Tobacco control strategy 2012-2017
- Make your car and homes smoke free
All related publications
- Summary of annual results for 2012
- Overview of historical data, 1999-2012
Find out how much you spend on cigarettes.
Read facts about tobacco use in children of grades 6-12.
